name: ninjaone-mcp
description: Query and manage NinjaOne RMM data — devices, organizations, tickets, alerts, and software — for MSP AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to automate or query NinjaOne RMM. List and filter devices by organization, class, or online status; get device details and installed software; reboot devices; manage Windows services; list organizations and their device counts; search and manage helpdesk tickets; and acknowledge or resolve alerts. Uses OAuth2 client_credentials. Call ninjaone_navigate first to load the tools for a specific domain.

ninjaone_client_id.title: NinjaOne Client ID
ninjaone_client_id.description: Your NinjaOne OAuth client ID. Required for both auth modes.

ninjaone_client_secret.title: NinjaOne Client Secret
ninjaone_client_secret.description: Required when auth mode is client_credentials. Ignored in user mode (browser sign-in). Leave blank if using user mode.

ninjaone_region.title: NinjaOne Region
ninjaone_region.description: Region code that auto-derives the base URL. Default us → https://app.ninjarmm.com. Valid values: us, eu (https://eu.ninjarmm.com), ca, oc, us2, fed. Change only if your NinjaOne instance is on a non-US shard.

ninjaone_auth_mode.title: Auth mode
ninjaone_auth_mode.description: client_credentials (default): paste a Client ID + Secret from a NinjaOne OAuth app and the server mints tokens automatically. user: skip the secret; instead run the `ninjaone_sign_in` tool in chat to open NinjaOne in your browser, sign in once, and the refresh token is stored to ~/.tech-tools/ninjaone-tokens.json. User mode requires your OAuth app to list http://127.0.0.1:53682/oauth/callback as an allowed redirect URI.

ninjaone_base_url.title: NinjaOne Base URL
ninjaone_base_url.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (https://app.ninjarmm.com). Only set for non-US regions or staging shards (e.g. https://eu.ninjarmm.com). The ninjaone_region field already auto-derives the correct regional URL — only set this to override it explicitly.
